creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 147280
GGobi update to 2.1.11

GGobi update from version 2.1.9 to long awaited 2.1.11.

Main improvements of graphics/ggobi port are
- Previous patches of the FreeBSD port are now upstream :)
- USES=pkgconfig tar:bzip2 libtool pathfix desktop-file-utils
- USE_AUTOTOOLS=libltdl
- Add license
- Add pkg-message about ggobirc configuration
- Remove .la files
- Strip binaries


Port was tested on RedPorts:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140913172643-06735


#portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
